title: Gmail
subtitle: Google email service with full read/write API access
comments: Uses Google Discovery Document format instead of OpenAPI. Requires OAuth 2.0 with a Google Cloud project that has the Gmail API enabled. The PKCE flow is handled in the Skyline MCP admin UI.
authNotes: Requires a Google Cloud project with Gmail API enabled. Create OAuth 2.0 credentials (Web application type) at https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/credentials. The Skyline admin UI handles the consent flow to obtain a refresh token.
